resources.string: Explore costumes, embroidery, customs, music and visitable ethno places from the six ethnographic regions.
A daily custom, a regional spotlight and quick access to the map.
Today we celebrate %1$s. Open it to see who has a name day and what the tradition means.
Today we celebrate %1$s. Open it to learn more about today\'s holiday.
Today we mark %1$s. Open it to learn more about the date.
Today\'s seasonal spotlight is %1$s. Open it to learn more.
There is no name day linked to this daily highlight.
Recognize the ethnographic landmark from the photo. Your points so far: %1$d.
Which place is shown in the photo?
Correct answer. You earn 1 point for today.
Not quite today. The correct answer is: %1$s.
You have unlocked the entire Ethno archive.
Photo for the question of the day
The image for today\'s question is missing.
Unlocked knowledge cards: %1$d of %2$d. Every 5 points opens a new ethnographic topic.
Unlocked knowledge cards: %1$d of %2$d. Points collected from the question of the day: %3$d.
You have unlocked all Ethno archive knowledge cards.
Keep collecting points from the question of the day to unlock this topic.
Track how many stamps and badges you have unlocked so far.
Open the map to choose a region and continue to its content.
Tap a region on the map to see its name and a short ethno highlight.
Use the button to open the region.
You can also open a region from the list below the map.
This screen brings together language, theme and the live phone features.
Manage the app language and theme directly from the interface instead of relying on the device settings.
The main phone capabilities used inside the app.
Location, camera and holiday notifications already work inside the app.
Nearby cultural places with museums, reserves and house museums
Ethno diary with photo, place and notes
Ethno passport with stamps and progress
Badges and a light game layer
Settings for language, theme and notifications
Kukeri rituals, two-part singing, rich costumes and cultural places from western Bulgaria.
Rich heritage of songs, costumes, rituals and a strong bond with the fertile southern lands of Bulgaria.
Expressive costumes, customs and music traditions from Bulgarias northern lands.
Vivid costumes, mountain identity and a rich festive calendar.
Mystical music, kaba gaida and a strong link between nature and tradition.
Field motifs, distinctive rhythm and agricultural rituals with a recognizable style.
Male and female costume with the main elements and ornaments.
Tap the name to open the embroidery image.
Key festive rituals and their meaning.
A short musical identity of the region.
Tap the instrument name to open its image.
Tap the name to open the place image.
Selected museums, reserves and house museums connected to the region.
A short quiz that opens separately when the user chooses to play.
Unlock stamps and badges as you explore the content and finish the quiz for %1$s.
Tap a marker on the costume to see more about the selected element.
The costume image has not been added to the app resources yet.
This track could not be loaded inside the app.
Use the device location to see which visitable ethno places are within a close radius around you.
Looking for the closest ethnographic places…
Without location permission we cannot calculate nearby cultural places.
We could not get the current location. Check whether location is enabled on the device.
No ethno places were found within a close radius of the current location.
The device did not return a valid location in Bulgaria, so we are showing visitable ethno places around Sofia.
Add a photo and a short note to your personal diary of encounters with Bulgarian traditions.
What impressed you about the place, costume or custom?
Capture a place, costume or detail directly inside the app.
The entry was added to the Ethno diary.
The photo was not saved. Please try again.
The image could not be attached. Please try again.
Without camera access we cannot add a photo to the diary.
There are no diary entries yet.
Turn on daily alerts for holidays, name days and the new question of the day that can earn points.
Notifications are active and will be checked every day around 09:00.
Notification permission was denied. You can enable it later from system settings.
There is no major holiday today, but the new question of the day is available.
There is a new question of the day worth 1 point.
Open Ethno Bulgaria to answer today\'s question and earn 1 point. %1$s
There is also a new question of the day worth 1 point. %1$s
%1$d more points until the next knowledge card.
You can unlock the next knowledge card today.
The map image is not available right now, so a backup view is shown.
Tap a region on the map or choose one from the list below.
Answer the questions and check whether you already recognize the main traits of the region.
After exploring %1$s, you can open the short quiz and check what you remember.
%1$d questions are waiting in this mini game.
Answer all questions to complete the region.
Answer the questions about %1$s when you are ready to play.
Collect stamps and badges as you open regions and complete their quizzes.
The stamp unlocks when you open the region.
The badge is unlocked with a score of %1$d/%2$d.
The badge unlocks with at least 4 correct answers.
